label: ER three-state rate recovery
notes: Three-state equal-rates simulation should recover one shared transition-rate surface and remain preferred over SYM and ARD on the governed twenty-four-taxon review tree.

label: SYM three-state rate recovery
notes: Three-state symmetric simulation should recover paired transition-rate structure and remain preferred over ER and ARD on the governed twenty-four-taxon review tree.

label: ARD three-state weak-identification review
notes: Three-state ARD simulation keeps all intended states but is governed as a weak-identification review surface because ER remains preferred by information criteria even under strong directional asymmetry.

label: ARD five-state overparameterized review
notes: Five-state ARD simulation on the governed twelve-taxon review tree should be reported as overparameterized failure evidence instead of a successful recoverable benchmark case.
